item.title: Three key winners from the AI boom and beyond
item.description: James Harries of the Trojan Global Income Fund picks three promising stocks that transcend the hype of the AI boom

item.title: RTX Corporation is a strong player in a growth market
item.description: RTX Corporation’s order backlog means investors can look forward to years of rising profits

item.title: Profit from MSCI – the backbone of finance
item.description: As an index provider, MSCI is a key part of the global financial system. Its shares look cheap

item.title: "Botched" Brexit: should Britain rejoin the EU?
item.description: Brexit did not go perfectly nor disastrously. It’s not worth continuing the fight over the issue, says Julian Jessop

item.title: Ayatollah Ali Khamenei: Iran’s underestimated chief cleric
item.description: Ayatollah Ali Khamenei is the Iranian regime’s great survivor portraying himself as a humble religious man while presiding over an international busin...
